reviews.review_title: Cant run the game on Note 8
reviews.review_description: Running the latest version and I'm stuck in the menu because the game refuses to download whatever it needs to download.

developer_response.body: Hi! We have updated the application. Could you try again, please? We think these issues have been fixed. Many thanks and apologies for the problems!

reviews.review_description:
Brought the game few days ago decided to delete everyother app. Have over 11gb of free spave on my note5 and getting "error check internet connection" error. Pls help¡ :(

....updated....
 Sorry about that review... i have dualband on my wifi modem. For some reason when i was connected to the 2.4ghz it would give me that error. I just had to connect to the 5ghz to fix the problem. Cheers :)

What a great little short film! The best part was the end. Can't wait to see more. I would definitely like to see a higher resolution version for the next part. Perhaps a shorter running time would allow for smoother animation and a higher resolution.

First off I wanna point out that the developers designed this for the rift, but also allowed it to run on gear. That being said not many apps run on both, gear ports are watered down usually. This is absolutely fantastic though! The resolution may be slightly lower, but overall the animation is low poly and still very immersive. People have complained about lag also. The best way to ensure no lag is to close all background apps and also optimize ur phones maintenance thru ur settings. I would recommend pausing the film for about 30 secs after start if lag continues. I have an s7 and this eliminated all lag. For 1.99 this is way better than other 3D 360 films which cost more. For instance "raising a ruckus" cost me 5.99 and is less than 10 mins long. This film is nearly 24 mins and is very thought provoking and beautiful.
Fails to install every single time .
I have the same problem as others i can't download the game it reaches 25% or even less and it gives an error and stops, what a shame....

developer_response.body:
Hi godea.adrian, we have improved the app and there is no need to download the video anymore. You can just press play and enjoy! 

Cheers.

reviews.review_description: All I get is a voiceover while nothing happens. The skybox is also broken - it is split vertically instead of one for each eye.

reviews.review_title: Will not run and no sound note 4
reviews.review_description: Had to free 5+GB to get it to install. Now it will start what looks to be a video that skips and locks up 5sec in with no sound :(  I rebooted the phone and closed all back ground apps. This is the 1st app that will not run at all.

Absolutely stunning. I feel this could be compared to Disney's Snow White, which was of course his first long feature film. With other earlier immersive animation works like the ones by VR pioneers Penrose Studios being like Steamboat Willie.

There are some technical issues on my S7 though. Playback frequently suffers from stuttering, sometimes only slightly, sometimes for a longer period. Still, the animation is absolutely breathtaking.

And the audio was inverted for some reason, left and right being interchanged. I had to switch around my earplugs to remedy this.

Be warned that this requires an additional 4 GB download to the internal memory. You might have to free up some space first. Definitely worth the effort though.
It's a 4K 3D video, so it's not very sharp. 4K is not enough for VR.

I was charged twice for this and havent recieved a response in close to a week. Wouldnt mind if i could even enjoy the app itself, but it freezes every 3 seconds so i cant even acknowledge if its good or not.

developer_response.body:
Hi SageBlayde, can you please update the app? The freeze problem should be fixed. 
What device are you using?
Cheers.

reviews.review_description:
Says no internet connection while I can download and stream from other games or sites.

(Apparently there's a problem with note 8. Just read other's review that had problem with note 8)

developer_response.body: Hi! We have updated the application. Could you try again, please? We think these issues have been fixed. Many thanks and apologies for the problems!

reviews.review_title: Doesn't download on my Galaxy note 8
reviews.review_description: After it's installed and you launch it you need to download more but it gets to .05% and starts glitching, it refuses to download from there. I've tried reinstalling and different networks, nothing works. There's no refund option. Not happy.

developer_response.body: Hi! We have updated the application. Could you try again, please? We think these issues have been fixed. Many thanks and apologies for the problems!

reviews.review_title: Updated. Working on Note8. And Great!
reviews.review_description:
Definitely recommend this experience. I've had this just sitting on my phone since a little after it came out, just waiting for an update because it wasn't working on Note8 at the time. I'm glad I kept it, because after the update, it's working great and it is a really interesting and moving experience.

It's unfortunate it got some low reviews early on because of technical issues that have now been fixed, but I can't wait for part 2! Definitely check it out and support unique experiences like this!
Just the best animation in mobile VR you can see this days. A powerful story told by beautiful graphics!
It's a shame, the sound cuts in and out, plus motion is not smooth, please fix! On s8.

developer_response.body: Hello! We have updated the app with fixes, please update! Thank you and sorry for the late response.
